message:
chore(beads): update issue tracker status for completed tasks

Update .beads/issues.jsonl to reflect progress on recently completed
work items, including aarch64 thread/TLS portability, stack reclamation,
and mutex type support. The JSONL format tracks issue metadata, status
transitions, and acceptance criteria for the bead-based development
workflow.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
